Combobox

Creatable dropdown using <lyte-combobox> Slyte DOM — combines text input with dropdown list. Supports search, create-new, multi-select with tags, and all standard field states. Figma source: Input Creatable Dropdown (5251:5457).

Floating Figma Synced 5 Variants
Default — Basic Combobox
Basic
With Label
Department
With Hint
Priority
Choose the priority level for this task
HTML
<div class="zc-combobox">
  <div class="zc-combobox-label">Department</div>
  <lyte-combobox lt-prop-placeholder="Choose department">
    <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
      <lyte-drop-box>
        <lyte-drop-body>
          <lyte-drop-item data-value="eng">Engineering</lyte-drop-item>
          <lyte-drop-item data-value="des">Design</lyte-drop-item>
          <lyte-drop-item data-value="mkt">Marketing</lyte-drop-item>
        </lyte-drop-body>
      </lyte-drop-box>
    </template>
  </lyte-combobox>
  <div class="zc-combobox-hint">Choose the priority level</div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-combobox {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
  width: 280px;
}
.zc-combobox lyte-combobox {
  height: 36px;
  border: 1px solid #D5D6D9;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: #FFFFFF;
}
Searchable — Type to Filter
Search Enabled
With Label
Timezone
Type to filter the list
Open with Results
Country
HTML
<div class="zc-combobox">
  <div class="zc-combobox-label">Timezone</div>
  <lyte-combobox lt-prop-placeholder="Search timezone…" lt-prop-search="true">
    <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
      <lyte-drop-box>
        <lyte-drop-body>
          <lyte-drop-item data-value="utc">UTC</lyte-drop-item>
          <lyte-drop-item data-value="est">EST (UTC-5)</lyte-drop-item>
          <lyte-drop-item data-value="pst">PST (UTC-8)</lyte-drop-item>
        </lyte-drop-body>
      </lyte-drop-box>
    </template>
  </lyte-combobox>
  <div class="zc-combobox-hint">Type to filter the list</div>
</div>
SCSS
/* lt-prop-search="true" enables built-in search */
.zc-combobox .zc-combobox-input {
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 12px;
  border: 1px solid #D5D6D9;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-family: 'ZohoPuvi', sans-serif;
  color: #25272C;
  outline: none;
}
.zc-combobox .zc-combobox-input:focus {
  border-color: #0D4EF2;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(13,78,242,0.12);
}
Creatable — Type to Add New
Create New
Tags
Type a new value and press Enter to create
With Existing Options
Category
Error State
Skill *
At least one skill is required
HTML
<div class="zc-combobox zc-combobox-creatable">
  <div class="zc-combobox-label">Tags</div>
  <lyte-combobox lt-prop-placeholder="Type to create…" lt-prop-search="true">
    <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
      <lyte-drop-box>
        <lyte-drop-body>
          <lyte-drop-item data-value="bug">Bug</lyte-drop-item>
          <lyte-drop-item data-value="feature">Feature</lyte-drop-item>
        </lyte-drop-body>
        <div class="zc-combobox-create-option">
          <i class="fas fa-plus"></i>
          <span>Create "<em>new tag</em>"</span>
        </div>
      </lyte-drop-box>
    </template>
  </lyte-combobox>
  <div class="zc-combobox-hint">Type and press Enter to create</div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-combobox-create-option {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 12px;
  color: var(--zc-color-primary-text-primary-text-default, #0D4EF2);
  font-size: 14px;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-top: 1px solid #EBEBEB;
}
.zc-combobox-create-option:hover {
  background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-subtle, #F5F8FE);
}
.zc-combobox-create-option i {
  font-size: 12px;
}
Multi-Select — With Tags
Empty
Assignees
With Tags
Skills
JavaScript Python React
Many Tags (Wrap)
Technologies
JavaScript TypeScript Python Go Rust
Select multiple technologies
HTML
<div class="zc-combobox zc-combobox-multi">
  <div class="zc-combobox-label">Skills</div>
  <div class="zc-combobox-input-wrapper zc-combobox-has-tags">
    <span class="zc-combobox-tag">
      JavaScript
      <button class="zc-combobox-tag-remove">
        <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
      </button>
    </span>
    <span class="zc-combobox-tag">
      Python
      <button class="zc-combobox-tag-remove">
        <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
      </button>
    </span>
    <input type="text" class="zc-combobox-input" placeholder="" />
    <span class="zc-combobox-arrow">
      <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
    </span>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-combobox-input-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  min-height: 36px;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  border: 1px solid #D5D6D9;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: #FFFFFF;
}
.zc-combobox-tag {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  height: 24px;
  padding: 0 8px;
  background: #E7EDFE;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #0D4EF2;
}
.zc-combobox-tag-remove {
  border: none;
  background: none;
  padding: 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #0D4EF2;
  font-size: 10px;
}
Disabled — Non-interactive
Empty Disabled
Filled Disabled
Role
Multi Disabled
Locked Skills
JavaScript Python
HTML
<div class="zc-combobox zc-combobox-disabled">
  <lyte-combobox lt-prop-placeholder="Select an option" lt-prop-disabled="true">
    <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
      <lyte-drop-box>
        <lyte-drop-body>
          <lyte-drop-item data-value="opt1">Option 1</lyte-drop-item>
        </lyte-drop-body>
      </lyte-drop-box>
    </template>
  </lyte-combobox>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-combobox-disabled,
.zc-combobox lyte-combobox[lt-prop-disabled="true"] {
  opacity: 0.55;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.zc-combobox-disabled lyte-combobox,
.zc-combobox-disabled .zc-combobox-input-wrapper {
  background: #E5E5E7;
  border-color: #D5D6D9;
}
